summary: This joint resolution terminates the national emergency that was declared by the President on March 13, 2020, in Proclamation 9994. The declaration had been made in response to the COVID-19 pandemic. The resolution exercises the authority granted to Congress under section 202 of the National Emergencies Act, which provides a legislative mechanism to end a national emergency. Upon enactment on April 10, 2023, the emergency declared in Proclamation 9994 was immediately ended. The measure does not contain any exceptions, conditions, or delayed effective dates.
